w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: DESIGN DOCUMENT: ENGNF1 (Next-Gen Interactive System Website)
The website should feel like interacting with a
system that thinks, reacts, and evolves
User click = system explains deeper layer
Systems that connect planning, execution, and decision-making in real time.
Systems fail not because of lack of data,
but because they cannot adapt in real time.
We build systems that observe, adapt, and optimize continuously.
Minimal text section (like research lab sites)
13. WHAT MAKES THIS “OUT OF THE BOX”
